name: io.github.csacanam/lotero
description: Provably fair on-chain slot machine for AI agents: x402 spins on Base, Chainlink VRF results.

environmentVariables.name: LOTERO_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Dedicated wallet with USDC on Base — pays spins/claims via x402. Required only for spin/claim.

environmentVariables.name: LOTERO_PLAYER_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Default player — the human's wallet, where winnings accrue and get claimed.

environmentVariables.name: LOTERO_MAX_SPINS_PER_SESSION
environmentVariables.description: Enforced responsible-gambling spin limit per session (default 10).
